caption: An animated man with tan skin and short dark hair, wearing a dark blue collared shirt, is shown in a close-up shot. He is positioned in a simple indoor setting with a grey wall and a white door or panel behind him. Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary, though the camera perspective shifts from a medium shot to tighter close-ups of his face. The screen is overlaid with translucent floating geometric shapes, including triangles, squares, hexagons, and plus signs in various colors. In the first frame, a green circle is drawn around his head and a white rectangular speech bubble appears beside him. By the final frame, a "SUBSCRIBE" button and a notification bell icon appear in the bottom right corner, accompanied by the text "Video title in this line" and "514,532 views".
